title: ultraDocumentBody
body:
eLearning tool student support

Learn.UQ (Blackboard)

For advice and guidance on Learn.UQ and other centrally supported eLearning tools, refer to the student guides webpage. 

Library AskUs team

The Library AskUs team are also available to provide student technical support.

Services and resources

The Library website contains a range of services and resources for students including:

  • technology support
  • assignment and study resources
  • support to build your skills
  • finding resources
  • study and personal help.

Information and services

Manage my program

The Manage my program webpage provides information about:

  • classes, timetables and coursework
  • exams and assessment (including exam information and applying for extensions)
  • student integrity and conduct (including academic integrity and plagiarism)
  • complaints and academic appeals
  • fees, payment and refunds
  • and more.
Student support

The Student support webpage provides information about:

  • study skills and learning advice
  • health and wellbeing
  • student advice and welfare
  • diversity, disability and inclusion
  • financial support
  • workshops
  • and more.
